conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we are going to learn about the form of finding the roots of a quadratic equation in algebraic calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional mathematical formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for finding the root of a quadratic equation is: its form is x = a + b - c.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the root of the equation when the quadratic coefficient a, the linear coefficient b, and the constant term c are known.
